# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change briefly.

Example:

- add browser profile export support
- fix URL session handling
- improve documentation
- add XAML prototype


## Related issue

Closes #

or

Related to #


## Type of change

Select all that apply.

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Prototype
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Other


## Description

Describe:

- what changed
- why the change was made
- expected behavior


## Repository area

Select all that apply.

- [ ] /core
- [ ] /contrib-xaml
- [ ] /examples
- [ ] /docs
- [ ] /lab
- [ ] tests
- [ ] other


## Behavior

Describe expected behavior after this change.

Example:

Before:

- browser session state remained between executions

After:

- browser session starts with isolated state


## Validation

Describe how this change was validated.

Examples:

- manual execution
- sample workflow
- local testing
- existing test cases
- new test cases


## Screenshots or files

If relevant, attach:

- screenshots
- sample workflows
- logs
- example projects


## Additional notes

Optional context or implementation details.


## Checklist

- [ ] Related documentation updated if needed
- [ ] Existing functionality remains unaffected
- [ ] Changes are focused on a single topic
- [ ] Relevant files and examples included
- [ ] I reviewed my changes before submitting
